# RectAn { #astroapers.RectAn }

```python
RectAn(
    positions,
    w_in,
    h_in,
    w_out,
    h_out,
    *,
    theta_in=0.0,
    theta_out=None,
    validate=True,
)
```

Rotated rectangular annulus in pixel coordinates.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**positions**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tuple or array - like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Annulus center or centers as ``(x, y)`` pixel coordinates. Multiple centers are accepted as an ``(N, 2)`` array-like object.

<code>[**w_in**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Inner rectangle full width and height in pixels. ``w_in`` is measured along the inner rectangle's local x axis, and ``h_in`` along its local y axis.

<code>[**h_in**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Inner rectangle full width and height in pixels. ``w_in`` is measured along the inner rectangle's local x axis, and ``h_in`` along its local y axis.

<code>[**w_out**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Outer rectangle full width and height in pixels. ``w_out`` is measured along the outer rectangle's local x axis, and ``h_out`` along its local y axis. Each outer dimension must be larger than the corresponding inner dimension. At ``theta_out=0``, the outer width axis is aligned with the image x axis and the outer height axis with the image y axis.

<code>[**h_out**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Outer rectangle full width and height in pixels. ``w_out`` is measured along the outer rectangle's local x axis, and ``h_out`` along its local y axis. Each outer dimension must be larger than the corresponding inner dimension. At ``theta_out=0``, the outer width axis is aligned with the image x axis and the outer height axis with the image y axis.

<code>[**theta_in**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [0.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Inner rectangle rotation angle in radians, measured counterclockwise from the positive image x axis to the inner rectangle's local width axis.

<code>[**theta_out**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Outer rectangle rotation angle in radians, measured counterclockwise from the positive image x axis to the outer rectangle's local width axis. If `None`, it defaults to ``theta_in``.

<code>[**validate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [bool]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   If `False`, skip input validation and assume finite, positive geometry, ordered dimensions, and normalized positions.
